scripts.help: node -e "const s=require('./package.json').scripts,d={help:'Show this help','web:dev':'Run Next.js web app in dev mode (hot reload)','web:build':'Build the web app for production','web:start':'Start the built web app','web:lint':'Lint the web app','shared:build':'Build the @cultuvilla/shared package','shared:test':'Run unit tests in @cultuvilla/shared','functions:build':'Compile cloud functions (functions/dist)','functions:typecheck':'Typecheck cloud functions','functions:test':'Run Cloud Functions unit tests','web:typecheck':'Typecheck the web app','shared:typecheck':'Typecheck the shared package','lint':'Lint everything (currently web only)','typecheck':'Typecheck shared, web, functions','build':'Build all workspaces (recursive)','test':'Run unit tests across the repo','test:integration':'Run @cultuvilla/shared integration tests against the emulator','test:rules':'Run firestore.rules e2e tests against the emulator','test:functions':'Run Cloud Functions tests against the emulator','test:emulators':'Run all emulator-backed test suites in sequence','check':'Lint + typecheck + test + build (CI parity)','seed:municipalities':'Seed Firestore municipalities (uses GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT — defaults to dev project)','deploy:rules:dev':'Deploy firestore + storage rules to DEV','deploy:rules:beta':'Deploy firestore + storage rules to BETA','deploy:rules:prod':'Deploy firestore + storage rules to PROD','deploy:indexes:dev':'Deploy firestore indexes to DEV','deploy:indexes:beta':'Deploy firestore indexes to BETA','deploy:indexes:prod':'Deploy firestore indexes to PROD','deploy:functions:dev':'Build + deploy cloud functions to DEV','deploy:functions:beta':'Build + deploy cloud functions to BETA','deploy:functions:prod':'Build + deploy cloud functions to PROD','deploy:firestore:dev':'Deploy firestore (rules + indexes) to DEV','deploy:firestore:beta':'Deploy firestore (rules + indexes) to BETA','deploy:firestore:prod':'Deploy firestore (rules + indexes) to PROD','deploy:all:dev':'Deploy everything (rules, indexes, functions, storage) to DEV','deploy:all:beta':'Deploy everything (rules, indexes, functions, storage) to BETA','deploy:all:prod':'Deploy everything (rules, indexes, functions, storage) to PROD','prepare':'Husky git hooks setup'};console.log('\nCultuvilla — pnpm scripts\n');for(const k of Object.keys(s)){console.log('  pnpm '+k.padEnd(26)+'  '+(d[k]||s[k]))}console.log('')"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm shared:typecheck && pnpm web:typecheck && pnpm functions:typecheck
scripts.build: pnpm shared:build && pnpm web:build && pnpm functions:build
scripts.test: pnpm shared:test && pnpm web:test && pnpm functions:test
scripts.test:functions: node scripts/run-tests-with-emulators.mjs npm --prefix functions run test:integration
scripts.test:emulators: pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:rules && pnpm test:functions
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.deploy:functions:dev: pnpm functions:build && firebase deploy --only functions --project dev
scripts.deploy:functions:beta: pnpm functions:build && firebase deploy --only functions --project beta
scripts.deploy:functions:prod: pnpm functions:build && firebase deploy --only functions --project prod
